C_D_NeutralContact_NoFail.comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect no failure when neutral contact is detected always present [1;1;4]

C_D_NeutralContactAlwaysPresent.comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect failure when neutral contact is detected always present and engine is running [1;1;8]

C_D_NeutralContactNeverPresent.comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect failure when neutral contact is detected never present and engine is running [16;1;128]

C_D_RearGear_NoFail.comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect no failure when rear contact is detected always present [1;1;4]

C_D_RearGearAlwaysPresent.comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect failure when rear contact is detected always present and engine is running [1;1;10]

C_K_MissionNbrNeutralFailure.comment: [] Nbr of mission before detect failure when neutral contact is detected never present and engine is running [0;1;10]

C_K_MissionNbrOilFailure.comment: [-] Number of missions to confirm Oil pressure switch failure [0:1:50]

C_K_StarterDeactivation.comment: [] Threshold to switch off the starter [0;1;100]

C_Ki_CurrentLowS.comment: [PWM/A.s]  PID Integral Gain parameter in low mode[O;1;2000]

C_Ki_CurrentNorm.comment: [PWM/A.s]  PID Integral Gain parameter in normal mode[O;1;2000]

C_Kp_CurrentLowS.comment: [PWM/A]  PID proportional Gain parameter in low mode[O;1;254]

C_Kp_CurrentNorm.comment: [PWM/A]  PID proportional Gain parameter in normal mode [O;1;254]

C_Pct_JaugeCourantInit.comment: [%] Initial value of the estimated SOC [0;1;100]

C_PWM_ACCompValveConverted.comment: [PWM]  Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValveConverted (when function Compressor Valve Gateway Mode is disabled at initialization) [O;1;255]

C_PWM_ACCompValvePIDout.comment: [PWM]  Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValvePIDout (when function AC Valve PID Regulation mode is disabled at initialization) [O;1;255]

C_PWM_ACCompValveSetting.comment: [PWM]  Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValveSetting (when function "Compressor Valve Regulation" is disabled)[O;1;255]

C_PWM_CompValveCommand_LHM.comment: [PWM] Valve PWM value applied if the valve request command is not available when the clutch is engaged.[O;1;100]

C_PWM_CompValveCommand_NM.comment: [PWM] Valve PWM value during a clutch engagement processing[O;1;100]

C_PWM_HighSpeedActivation.comment: [%] Threshold to activate the fan in high speed [0:1:100]

C_PWM_HighSpeedDectivation.comment: [%] Threshold to deactivate the fan from high speed to low speed [0:1:100]

C_PWM_LowSpeedActivation.comment: [%] Threshold to activate the fan in low speed [0:1:100]

C_PWM_LowSpeedDectivation.comment: [%] Threshold to deactivate the fan from low speed [0:1:100]

C_PWM_SatDutyCycleSet_max.comment: [PWM]  Upper limit of the saturation Sat_DutyCycleSet[O;1;100]

C_PWM_SatDutyCycleSet_min.comment: [PWM]  Lower limit of the saturation Sat_DutyCycleSet[O;1;100]

C_S_VehicleRunnig_max.comment: [km/h] Vehicle speed above which "VehicleRunning" is activated [0;0.1;10]

C_S_VehicleRunnig_min.comment: [km/h] Vehicle speed under which "VehicleRunning" is disactivated [0;0.01;10]

C_Td_CurrentLowS.comment: [s]  PID derivative time constant parameter in low mode [O;0.1;100]

C_Td_CurrentNorm.comment: [s]  PID derivative time constant parameter in normal mode[O;0.1;100]

C_TM_ACClutchActivation.comment: [s] Delay before activating compressor clutch when ACCompAuthorized comes to active [O;0.01;2.5]

C_TM_HalogenStabilization.comment: [seconds] Duration for stabilization of Halogen Lights when switched on [0:0.01:2,55]

C_TM_HighSpeedFan_Enable.comment: [ms] Timeout to ensure a stabilized OFF operation after status changing from low speed to high speed [0:1:255]

C_TM_HighSpeedFanStable.comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure stabilized high speed reached by the motor fan from high speed to low speed. [0;100;2000]

C_TM_IgnON_EngineOFF.comment: [s] Time out before detecting failure when ignition is ON and engine is stopped [O;0.1;10]

C_TM_LimpHomeModeFan.comment: [seconds] Timeout to control the motor fan in low speed when CAN bus is off or when thed ECM is absent to ensure the cooling of the engine and when ignition disappears. [0;1;600]

C_TM_LowSpeedFan_Enable.comment: [ms] Timeout to ensure a stabilized OFF operation after status changing from high speed to low speed [0:1:255]

C_TM_LowSpeedFanStable.comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure a stabilized low speed reached by the motor fan from stopped state to high speed [0;1;10]

C_TM_NeutralContact_NoFail.comment: [s] Maximum duration to detect no failure when neutral contact is detected never present [0;0.5;5]

C_TM_OilPressureWarning.comment: [s] Time out to enable warning if oil pressure is opened and engine RPM is higher than a threshold [O;1;10]

C_TM_QuickStarterCANConfirmation.comment:
[ms] [0;10;5000]
Maximum time to receive the CAN confirmation after receiving the trigger from ECM before shuting down the starter

C_TM_RefreshBattTempCalcul.comment: [s] Time to refresh Battery Temperature Calculation [1;1;255]

C_TM_StabilizedInLowSpeed.comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure a stabilized low speed reached by the front wiper motor [0,0.01,1]

C_TM_Starter2Delay.comment:
[ms] [0;10;5000]
Delay time to activate SS_STARTER_RLY after STARTER_RLY
